whole_body_template:
Body Composition Assessment

1.Total body fat percentage: {fat_percent}%
Result: {fat_result}
Reference:
Male:normal:<23%;overweight:23%~35%;obesity:>=35%
Female:normal:<25%;overweight:25%~38%;obesity:>=38%

2.Estimated visceral adipose tissue (VAT area): {vat_area} cm2
Result: {vat_result}
Reference:Normal:<100;Increased:100~160;High:>=160

3.Appendicular Lean/Height2 (muscle mass) index: {lean_index} kg/m2
Result: {lean_result}
Reference:AWGS 2019 (Asian Working Group for Sarcopenia)
Male:Low lean mass:<7.0 kg/m2;normal:>=7.0 kg/m2
Female:Low lean mass:<5.4 kg/m2;normal:>=5.4kg/m2

4.Android/Gynoid Ratio: {ag_ratio}
Result: {ag_result}
Reference:>=1:Apple-shape; <1: Pear-shape
